rationale: Major frictions: the hook is a high-energy teenage boy dancing in a dark earth-tone palette, which clashes hard with Marble Sort's pastel lavender, calm/satisfying tone, and 25-55 female casual audience. The UGC concept also never shows the sorting/physics core loop, so it fails to communicate mechanic or drive qualified installs. Skip this archetype, or only test a heavily reskinned variant featuring an adult woman expressing relaxation/relief with clear gameplay B-roll of marbles dropping into colored boxes.
